faults.name: Input capacitor decade error
faults.why: A wrong input capacitor shifts the cutoff frequency far from the lab calculation.
faults.verification_test: Measure gain below and above the intended cutoff frequency.
faults.fix_recipe: Replace the capacitor with the calculated value and retest the Bode points.

faults.name: Non-inverting bias return missing
faults.why: The op-amp input has no DC reference, so the output can drift or saturate.
faults.verification_test: Measure the non-inverting input DC voltage with respect to ground.
faults.fix_recipe: Add the required bias resistor or reference connection.

faults.name: Feedback resistor open
faults.why: An open feedback path makes the active filter behave like an open-loop comparator.
faults.verification_test: Power off and measure continuity through the feedback resistor.
faults.fix_recipe: Reconnect or replace the feedback resistor.
